gt_sql: SELECT T1.Segment FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID GROUP BY T1.Segment ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY SUM(y.Consumption) ASC
LIMIT 1
question: Which segment had the least consumption?
